    How to claim an artifact

    1. Open any genesis artifact below and click Download bundle.
    2. Paste the Markdown file into ChatGPT (or Claude / Gemini). Edit the prose to your taste.
    3. Use the File Mapping footer at the bottom of the MD to ask the LLM to regenerate the JSON (and, for solutions, code + reports).
    4. Submit your polished bundle at /submit. Founder reviews → mainnet → you earn the upstream royalty stream.
    PWM · NumFOCUS fiscally sponsored
